Package org.eventb.internal.core.parser

Class ParseResult

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.AbstractResult
org.eventb.internal.core.parser.ParseResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
IParseResult, IResult
public class ParseResult extends AbstractResult implements IParseResult
Result of a Parsed formula.

  • Method Details

    • getParsedAssignment

      public Assignment getParsedAssignment()
      Description copied from interface: IParseResult
      Returns the parsed assignment.

      A null result is returned in the following cases (exhaustive list):

      • errors were encountered during parsing,
      • the parser was not configured for parsing an assignment.

      Specified by:
      getParsedAssignment in interface IParseResult
      Returns:
      the parsed assignment or null in case of error

    • getParsedExpression

      public Expression getParsedExpression()
      Description copied from interface: IParseResult
      Returns the parsed expression.

      A null result is returned in the following cases (exhaustive list):

      • errors were encountered during parsing,
      • the parser was not configured for parsing an expression.

      Specified by:
      getParsedExpression in interface IParseResult
      Returns:
      the parsed expression or null in case of error

    • getParsedPredicate

      public Predicate getParsedPredicate()
      Description copied from interface: IParseResult
      Returns the parsed predicate.

      A null result is returned in the following cases (exhaustive list):

      • errors were encountered during parsing,
      • the parser was not configured for parsing a predicate.

      Specified by:
      getParsedPredicate in interface IParseResult
      Returns:
      the parsed predicate or null in case of error

    • getParsedType

      public Type getParsedType()
      Description copied from interface: IParseResult
      Returns the parsed type.

      A null result is returned in the following cases (exhaustive list):

      • errors were encountered during parsing,
      • the parser was not configured for parsing a type.

      Specified by:
      getParsedType in interface IParseResult
      Returns:
      the parsed type or null in case of error

    • getFormulaFactory

      public FormulaFactory getFormulaFactory()
      Description copied from interface: IParseResult
      Returns the formula factory used for parsing.
      Specified by:
      getFormulaFactory in interface IParseResult
      Returns:
      the formula factory used

    • getOrigin

      public Object getOrigin()

    • resetParsedFormula

      public void resetParsedFormula()
      Sets the parsed formula to null.

    • setParsedAssignment

      public void setParsedAssignment(Assignment formula)
      Sets the parsed assignment.
      Parameters:
      formula - the assignment that has been parsed

    • setParsedExpression

      public void setParsedExpression(Expression formula)
      Sets the parsed expression.
      Parameters:
      formula - the expression that has been parsed

    • setParsedPredicate

      public void setParsedPredicate(Predicate formula)
      Sets the parsed predicate.
      Parameters:
      formula - the formula that has been parsed

    • setParsedType

      public void setParsedType(Type type)
      Sets the parsed type.
      Parameters:
      type - the type that has been parsed
